# Test transport creation for mcp-probe
# Tests command transport and stdio transport

# Change to the mcp-probe directory
cd /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/tmc/mcp/cmd/mcp-probe

# Build mcp-probe first since it's not in the default tools
exec go build

# Test with help
exec ./mcp-probe -h
stderr 'Usage'
stderr 'timeout'
stderr 'HTTP endpoint'

# Test with invalid flag
! exec ./mcp-probe -invalid
stderr 'flag provided but not defined'

# Build a simple test server
exec go build -o testserver testserver/main.go
exists testserver
